title: The role of management in facilitating communication
summary: 9609 A Level — managers as communicators and culture builders.
learningObjectives: Describe open vs closed communication cultures.

simpleExplanation.title: Managers set the tone
simpleExplanation.summary: Leaders model openness, choose appropriate channels, and remove barriers so strategy and feedback flow effectively.
steps: Walk the floor — management by walking around.

sections.content: **Management and communication** (7.2.5) completes **7.2**. Link to **7.3 leadership** next topic.
